name: Kottopoula Me Mpamiez (Chicken with Okra)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the chickens. If they are whole, cut into serving pieces.
2. Season lightly with salt and pepper, then set aside to drain.
3. Wash the okra and remove the stems carefully without cutting the okra.
4. Line up the okra in a large flat pan and sprinkle with vinegar.
5. Place in the sun for 30 minutes to 1 hour.
6. Brown the butter in a pot on low heat.
7. Add the chicken and sauté until brown, then add the onion and let it brown.
8. Add the tomatoes and boil for 3 to 5 minutes.
9. Add water and simmer for 30 minutes.
10. Add the okra and continue to simmer, covered, until tender.
11. Watch carefully as this may need a little more water. The okra will have absorbed the liquid and only the oil should remain when the dish is cooked.
